programs.programName: Idaho Medicaid Aged, Blind, and Disabled (ABD) Program

programs.programName: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) - Idaho PACE

verified.notes: Search results confirm PACE operates in Idaho (listed in state directory at https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/long-term-services-supports/downloads/state-website-list.pdf). Age requirement (55+) sourced from non-government provider directory but reflects standard PACE eligibility. Income limits, asset limits, and official Idaho PACE phone number not found in provided search results. Recommend contacting Idaho Department of Health and Welfare directly or visiting the state PACE website for current eligibility details and application assistance.

programs.notes: Search results confirm PACE operates in Idaho (listed in state directory at https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/long-term-services-supports/downloads/state-website-list.pdf). programs.programName: Medicare Savings Programs (Qualified Medicare Beneficiary - QMB, Specified Low-Income Medicare Beneficiary - SLMB, Qualifying Individual - QI)

verified.notes: Income limits provided are for QMB program (most restrictive of the three programs). SLMB and QI have higher income limits but asset limits are the same across all three programs. Official phone number for Idaho application not found in search results; contact Idaho Department of Health and Welfare or Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services directly.

programs.programName: Long-Term Care Ombudsman Program (Title III-B & VII)

verified.notes: Program has no income or asset requirements; services are free. Official ICOA site (https://aging.idaho.gov/ombudsman-program/) confirms program but lacks specific details.

verified.notes: Idaho Home Choice is a Medicaid long-term care transition program (Money Follows the Person). Income and asset limits provided are for nursing home Medicaid eligibility as of 2026. No household-of-2 income limit, age requirement, or official phone number found in available sources. Program details available at https://healthandwelfare.idaho.gov/services-programs/medicaid-health/idaho-home-choice
